CustomField.description: Total unsecured liabilities from all attached Insolvency Accounts
CustomField.formula: IF(Client_Identifiers__c == 'Canaccede' || Client_Identifiers__c == 'Affirm', Null, CASE( $Profile.Name , 'SDA Community User', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SDA__c , 'SDA Community User Readonly', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SDA__c , 'New SDA Login Community User', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SDA__c , 'SDA Login Community User Readonly', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SDA__c , 'SPL Community User', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, 'SPL Community User Readonly', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, 'SPL Login Community User', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, 'New SPL Login Community User Readonly', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, 'Scotia Bank Community User', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c , 'Scotia Bank Community User Readonly', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c, 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c, 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User Readonly', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c, 'Scotia SPL Common Login Community User Readonly', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c + Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, 'Scotia SPL Common Community User Readonly', Unsecured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c + Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c, Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SPL__c + Unsecured_Claim_Amount_Scotia__c + Unsecured_Claim_Amount_SDA__c ))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total unsecured liabilities from all attached Insolvency Accounts
CustomField.label: Total Unsecured Claim Amount
